prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `0692e18c`.
codex_response:
The rule for `0692e18c` is: take the single-color `n x n` input, swap foreground and background to make an inverted tile, then stamp that tile into each output block whose corresponding input cell is foreground. I used the `opus46` hint as the starting hypothesis and discarded the `sonnet45` hint because it predicts a 90-degree rotation, which contradicts the official examples; that mismatch is documented in [arc2/tasks/task_0692e18c/notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0692e18c/notes.md).

The new task package is in [arc2/tasks/task_0692e18c/__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0692e18c/__init__.py), [arc2/tasks/task_0692e18c/verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0692e18c/verifier.py), and [arc2/tasks/task_0692e18c/generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0692e18c/generator.py). No new primitive was needed. The generator stays close to the official family by keeping inputs as `3x3`, single-color, moderate-density masks with `3-6` foreground cells, then constructing outputs by explicit inverse-tile stamping rather than delegating to the verifier.

Validation passed with `conda run -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 0692e18c` (`4/4` official examples) and `conda run -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 0692e18c --n-examples 1000`. Generated data is in [arc2/artifacts/0692e18c/task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0692e18c/task.json) and [arc2/artifacts/0692e18c/examples](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0692e18c/examples). Preview outputs are [arc2/artifacts/0692e18c/previews/originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0692e18c/previews/originals.png), [arc2/artifacts/0692e18c/previews/preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0692e18c/previews/preview_01.png), [arc2/artifacts/0692e18c/previews/preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0692e18c/previews/preview_02.png), and [arc2/artifacts/0692e18c/previews/preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0692e18c/previews/preview_03.png). I confirmed the PNGs were produced and readable; direct visual inspection of the sheets wasn’t possible in this terminal because no image renderer is installed.
